memberdef.argsstring: (Col< std::complex< typename T1::pod_type > > &eigval, Mat< typename T1::elem_type > &l_eigvec, Mat< typename T1::elem_type > &r_eigvec, const Base< typename T1::elem_type, T1 > &X, const typename arma_blas_type_only< typename T1::elem_type >::result *junk=0)
memberdef.name: eig_gen

briefdescription.para: Eigenvalues and eigenvectors (both left and right) of general real/complex square matrix X.

memberdef.argsstring: (Col< std::complex< eT > > &eigval, Mat< std::complex< eT > > &eigvec, const Base< eT, T1 > &X, const char side='r', const typename arma_blas_type_only< typename T1::elem_type >::result *junk=0)
memberdef.name: eig_gen

detaileddescription.para: Eigenvalues and eigenvectors of general real square matrix X. Optional argument 'side' specifies which eigenvectors should be computed: 'r' for right (default) and 'l' for left.

memberdef.argsstring: (Col< std::complex< T > > &eigval, Mat< std::complex< T > > &eigvec, const Base< std::complex< T >, T1 > &X, const char side='r', const typename arma_blas_type_only< typename T1::elem_type >::result *junk=0)
memberdef.name: eig_gen

detaileddescription.para: Eigenvalues and eigenvectors of general complex square matrix X Optional argument 'side' specifies which eigenvectors should be computed: 'r' for right (default) and 'l' for left.

memberdef.argsstring: (Col< typename T1::pod_type > &eigval, const Base< typename T1::elem_type, T1 > &X, const typename arma_blas_type_only< typename T1::elem_type >::result *junk=0)
memberdef.name: eig_sym

briefdescription.para: Eigenvalues of real/complex symmetric/hermitian matrix X.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Base< typename T1::elem_type, T1 > &X, const typename arma_blas_type_only< typename T1::elem_type >::result *junk=0)
memberdef.name: eig_sym

briefdescription.para: Eigenvalues of real/complex symmetric/hermitian matrix X.

memberdef.argsstring: (Col< typename T1::pod_type > &eigval, Mat< typename T1::elem_type > &eigvec, const Base< typename T1::elem_type, T1 > &X, const typename arma_blas_type_only< typename T1::elem_type >::result *junk=0)
memberdef.name: eig_sym

briefdescription.para: Eigenvalues and eigenvectors of real/complex symmetric/hermitian matrix X.
